programmes.show_description: Mulder and Scully are called in to investigate cases of seemingly spontaneous combustion.
Upset by a death in her family, Scully becomes entangled in the machinations of a serial killer on the loose and a murderer on death row.
Scully and Mulder probe the death of someone who apparently died from an overdose of orgasmic delight.
An injured FBI agent appears to be possessed by a criminal he shot, and Scully herself is in danger.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Simon grapples with a juggernaut that has skidded off the M62 and is leaking diesel. Rory deals with a mobile library that's been the victim of an arson attack.
A luxury coach gives up the ghost on a motorway slip road. A straightforward job segues into disaster for Marta. Scott races to recover a damaged trailer before dark descends.
Jim must rescue a 32-tonne truck from a soft dirt embankment. Marta is driven around the bend trying to deliver a 48-foot articulated bus.
Matt Adams is rustling up his roughest ride ever. Plus, Macca McReady sails into trouble and the Stephens brothers battle backwoods to rescue their haul.
Tanker driver Sludge tries to dodge disaster, Steve Graham suffers from his worst nightmare on the road, and Macca McReady hits rough weather that throws him into jeopardy.
Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery, Yogi runs out of road, and two concrete specialists head off the map and into trouble.
Jonny Rayner faces a seemingly impossible choice - take on a crocodile-infested river at 2am or wait until dawn and further delay his critical run.
Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt, Roscoe battles the elements on a world-famous rally, and Turbo is flagged down by the boys in blue.
Frontier drama starring Victor Mature and Suzan Ball. The story of a legendary Native American warrior who rises through the ranks to become chief of his tribe. (1955)

A town Marshal (Gary Cooper) and his new bride (Grace Kelly) must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon, when the gang leader he sent to jail years ago arrives on the noon train.

American Revolution drama starring Mel Gibson and Heath Ledger. A farmer with a new-found pacifism but a brutal military past decides to fight again when his son is captured. (2000)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
American Revolution drama starring Mel Gibson and Heath Ledger. A farmer with a new-found pacifism but a brutal military past decides to fight again when his son is captured. (2000)
The Glovers fight a harsh winter on the highway while low bedding their 45-tonne winch to Erie Mountain. On Gollen, Craig's exit plan faces delays from breakdowns and a block collision.
Craig and the crew return home to log a local block, but Kylee discovers its road is just as treacherous as Gollen. Heavy snow buries Brent's plan to haul logs from one of his blocks.
Craig's crew return to camp to log Saddle Ridge, but boulders make the block nearly impossible. The Glovers' winch spews thick white smoke, and bad news arrives from the government.
...Skill. A million dollars' worth of timber could be stranded unless Craig works out a plan. Brent is weeks behind in logging and narrowly avoids disaster while uprooting a giant tree.

Highlights from the series that follows experts who transport huge and unusual loads across the nation. (Ep1)
A dangerous drug dealer lets far more than the cat out of the bag and name-swapping friends leave the interceptors baffled.
Mac stops a driver for having no insurance and unearths a huge drugs haul, and the chopper tracks down two notorious burglars.
Western starring John Wayne and George Kennedy. A US marshal returns from a manhunt to discover that his sons have helped to rob a bank. (1973)

Western starring John Wayne and George Kennedy. A US marshal returns from a manhunt to discover that his sons have helped to rob a bank. (1973)
The evil Clanton gang kills Marshal Wyatt Earp's brother after he saves Doc Holliday, a gambler, from them. He and Doc then go on a mission to take revenge.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The evil Clanton gang kills Marshal Wyatt Earp's brother after he saves Doc Holliday, a gambler, from them. He and Doc then go on a mission to take revenge.
Craig and his team are pushed to breaking point after a serious accident with a fully loaded logging truck traps their lead driver. Is having the most dangerous job in Canada worth it?
Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston. A gang of burglars who have been targeting pensioners are spotted in Halifax.
A Peugeot driver tries to give interceptor Ky Kirk the slip around the bumpy backstreets of Nottingham. Ky sends out an SOS to colleagues Rob and Dan who gun it to the scene.
There's a hunt for a dodgy Fiesta. But with the interceptors on its tail, the driver stacks the vehicle into a roundabout and the occupants go to ground.
Snooker's top 12 players compete for the title in the final stop before the World Championships. Judd Trump and Mark Allen play to a conclusion for a place in the Quarter Finals.
An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect's story.
A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it's been in an accident. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.
A crime spree appears to be the work of a cold-blooded killer who was believed to have died in prison.
New Jersey police crack down on reckless driving. A cop is called to an exploding minibus and attends a three-car crash on one of the state's most dangerous roads. (Ep1)
